hero.label: The Travel Blog
hero.subtitle: Authentic stories, iconic destinations and travel photography to inspire you to leave.

home.about_title: Travel as a way of life
home.about_subtitle: Passionate about exploration, I document every adventure to share the essentials — curiosity, connection, wonder.
home.about_text: From the fjords of Norway to the streets of Marrakech, through the temples of Tokyo and the cliffs of Santorini, The Travel Blog was born from a simple conviction: every journey transforms. No generic tourist guides here — only authentic stories, honest photos and practical advice from the field. Join me on this adventure and let yourself be inspired to go off the beaten track.
home.dest_subtitle: A few countries that have left their mark — hover over the cards to learn more.
home.blog_subtitle: The most recent stories from the travel journal.
home.gallery_subtitle: Filter by category and click on a photo to enlarge it.

next_dest.teaser: A new adventure is being prepared…

about.title: About
about.subtitle: The traveler behind the stories
about.name: I'm Bouba
about.passion: Passionate about travel, photography and encounters.
about.bio1: Since my first trip to Greece, I understood that the world was much bigger than what books could tell. Each destination taught me something — about others, about myself, about what really matters.
about.bio2: The Travel Blog was born from this conviction: sharing the essentials to inspire you to travel in turn. No generic guides, but honest stories, authentic photos and tips from the field.
about.countries_subtitle: 6 countries, 4 continents, memories for a lifetime.
about.contact_subtitle: A question, a collaboration, a simple hello? Write to me.
